series_metadata.series_description: All informal and/or temporary messages and notes including telephone voice mail messages, instant messages, text messages, post-it-notes, routine/generic e-mails, routine correspondence, social media posts, shared departmental calendars, drafts and other limited documents which serve to convey information of temporary importance in lieu of oral communication.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: no longer of administrative value ; Electronic: no longer of administrative value
